data.title: Brazil to Promote Blockchain in BRICS Trade During Chairmanship
data.description:
According to Odaily, Brazil is planning to advocate for the use of blockchain technology in international trade among BRICS member countries to streamline financial transactions in import and export contracts. This initiative will be a priority for Brazil when it assumes the rotating presidency of BRICS in January 2025. Unlike previous discussions about creating a common BRICS currency, this proposal is not intended to challenge the U.S. dollar's role in global trade but aims to enhance the efficiency of international transactions by leveraging the immediacy and programmability of cryptocurrencies. Stablecoins have already been used informally in some cross-border transactions.

The Central Bank of Brazil is advancing the Drex pilot project, a key initiative exploring the application of blockchain in the traditional financial system. Drex seeks to establish a financial asset trading infrastructure based on tokenization technology, with a focus on cross-border transactions. However, the project faces challenges in maintaining transaction privacy while ensuring central bank regulatory control in a decentralized environment.

In addition to blockchain solutions, another potential alternative is the creation of a multinational integrated network similar to Brazil's instant payment system, Pix. However, this model may raise concerns among member countries regarding governance and financial sovereignty.

data.title: Brazil to promote encryption technology in BRICS trade as a priority during its presidency
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the Brazilian media "Globo", Brazil plans to promote the application of blockchain technology in international trade among BRICS member countries to simplify the financial transaction process of import and export contracts. This initiative will be one of Brazil's priorities during its term as the rotating presidency of the BRICS countries from January 2025.
The proposal is different from the previously discussed idea of ​​creating a common currency for BRICS countries. Sources stressed that the initiative is not intended to challenge the global trade status of the US dollar, but to improve the efficiency of international transactions and learn from the immediacy and programmability of cryptocurrencies. In fact, stablecoins have been used for cross-border transactions in some informal occasions.
The Drex pilot project being promoted by the Central Bank of Brazil (BC) is also one of the key practices of the country to explore the application of blockchain in the traditional financial system. Drex aims to establish a financial asset trading infrastructure based on tokenization technology, with cross-border transactions listed as a research focus. However, the project still faces the challenge of how to ensure the regulatory control of the central bank while maintaining transaction privacy in a decentralized environment.
In addition to the blockchain solution, another possible alternative is to establish a cross-border integrated network similar to the Brazilian instant payment system Pix. However, this model may raise concerns among member states about governance and financial sovereignty.

data.title: Weekly Market Highlights - Binance Secures Landmark US$2B Investment from MGX
data.description: 14 March 2025Macro/TradFiBinance has secured a landmark US$2B investment from MGX, an Abu Dhabi-based AI and technology investor. This marks the first institutional investment in Binance and the largest crypto-related deal ever funded in stablecoins.The Strategic Bitcoin Reserve that was announced last Thursday will hold an estimated 200K BTC and the U.S. will not sell any Bitcoin deposited into the Reserve. The Secretaries of Treasury and Commerce are authorized to develop budget-neutral strategies for acquiring additional Bitcoin, provided that those strategies have no incremental costs on American taxpayers.The Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) published guidance to confirm that crypto-asset custody, certain stablecoin activities, and participation in independent node verification are now allowed for national banks and federal savings associations without requiring special approval.Chinese tariffs on U.S. agricultural goods began on Monday in response to U.S. tariffs that went into effect on China last week.25% tariffs on imports from Mexico and Canada went into effect on Tuesday. Ontario then announced a 25% increase on electricity exports to the U.S. in response to the trade war which was eventually rescinded after Trump threatened a 50% tariff on Canada’s aluminum and steel.The European Union will impose counter tariffs on €26B (US$28B) worth of U.S. goods from next month, after the U.S. tariffs of 25% on all steel and aluminium imports took effect on WednesdayDeutsche Bank says Bitcoin is "like gold" and the US strategic Bitcoin reserve "could set international standards."Video-sharing platform Rumble has announced the purchase of US$17M in Bitcoin as a part of its new treasury strategy.Japanese publicly traded company Metaplanet has announced the issuance of 2 billion yen (approximately US$12.7M) in zero-interest ordinary bonds to further invest in Bitcoin.U.S. President Donald Trump has expressed optimism regarding the latest inflation figures after the latest data came in at 2.8%, below the expected 2.9% rate.Franklin Templeton becomes the largest asset manager to file for a Solana ETF. CryptoL1/L2:Monad testnet has reached a significant milestone, with daily transactions surpassing 1.3 million and total transactions exceeding 237 million.Mercado Bitcoin to issue US$200M in tokenized assets in Latin America via the Polygon network.The vote for SIMD-228, a proposal to change Solana’s inflation to a market based emission mechanism, has failed to achieve the supermajority quorum of 67%.Transaction activity, measured by 7-day moving average, on Base network has dropped 38% from 6 January but remains the top Ethereum L2.StarkWare has established a “Strategic Bitcoin Reserve,” aiming to hold a growing proportion of its treasury in BTC as part of their vision to unify Bitcoin and Ethereum.Holesky, one of Ethereum's two main testnet networks, has finally regained finality after nearly two weeks of non-finalization since developers activated Pectra on it.DeFi:PancakeSwap burned over 9 Million CAKE tokens worth US$15M as part of its ongoing efforts to manage the supply of CAKE.A whale on Hyperliquid opened a US$200M ETH long position before reducing his margin below maintenance requirements, walking away with US$1.8m in profits while the Hyperliquid Provider Vault (HLP) suffered a US$4M loss.Institutional tokenization firm Securitize has selected RedStone as its main data provider for both its existing and upcoming products by Apollo, BlackRock, Hamilton Lane, and KKR.Others:GnosisDAO has reached a quorum to invest an additional US$4.8M to fund further R&D of a private, uncensorable VPN with hopes of bringing it to market within two years.Axelar Foundation has disclosed strategic token sales worth US$30M to support institutional tokenization of real-world assets (RWAs) through its interoperability protocol.Anchorage Digital and Copper.co is set to provide digital asset custody services for Cantor Fitzgerald’s new global Bitcoin financing business, which will provide leverage to institutional investors who hold Bitcoin.Blackrock’s tokenized fund, BUIDL, surpassed US$1B in assets under management on Thursday, becoming the first institutional on-chain fund to do so.Ripple has received regulatory approval on Thursday to provide crypto payments and services in Dubai, in a region where the potential cross-border payments market is worth US$40B.Latest Binance Research Publications Check out our latest publications:The Future of Bitcoin #4: DeFiMonthly Market Insights - March 2025Sustainable Tokenomics: Questions Every Founder Should Think AboutExplore our Binance Research website for more project and macro research.For more frequent market updates and insights, follow us on Twitter @BinanceResearch.That’s a wrap!Binance
